title: Stromboli
writer: Roberto Rossellini, Sergio Amidei, Gian Paolo Callegari
actors: Ingrid Bergman, Mario Vitale, Renzo Cesana
plot: Karin, a young woman from the Baltic countries, marries fisherman Antonio to escape from a prison camp. But she cannot get used to the tough life in Antonio's volcano-threatened village, Stromboli.
